raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The City of Chula Vista is the largest city in California without a public university offering baccalaureate degree programs.",
    "Nearly 600,000 residents in South County do not have access to a public university.",
    "Chula Vista is often referred to as a 'college desert' due to the lack of higher education institutions.",
    "The City of Chula Vista is developing a University Innovation District on over 383 acres of city-owned land.",
    "The University Innovation District aims to be a bi-national, multi-institutional hub for higher education and innovation.",
    "The goal of the University Innovation District is to streamline educational pathways and align programs with regional workforce needs.",
    "AB 662 seeks to address long-standing educational inequities in South San Diego County."
  ]
}
```
